scores.notes: Company name mostly correct but with minor spacing issues; address partially incorrect ('NO.55,57 & 59' vs 'NO.53 55,57 & 59' and 'JALAN SAGU IR' vs 'JALAN SAGU 18', 'TANAN DAYA' vs 'TAMAN DAYA').
